name: HPCL ENERGIE BOBCARD
exclusions: fuel spends eligible for surcharge waiver do not earn reward points
HP Pay direct payment mode is not eligible for listed fuel savings
taxes and charges excluded as per BOBCARD terms
milestoneBenefits: 2,000 joining reward points on spending Rs 5,000 or more within 60 days
Renewal fee waiver on annual spends of Rs 50,000
additionalBenefits: 24 reward points per Rs 150 on HPCL fuel and LPG purchases through eligible modes
10 reward points per Rs 150 on utility, grocery and departmental store spends
2 reward points per Rs 150 on other categories
1% fuel surcharge waiver on HPCL fuel transactions between Rs 400 and Rs 5,000
4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year
25% off up to Rs 100 on Paytm Movies on minimum 2 tickets per transaction

salaried: Resident Indian primary cardholder between 21 and 65 years
Income of Rs 3.6 lakh per annum or more
selfEmployed: Resident Indian primary cardholder between 21 and 65 years
Income of Rs 4.8 lakh per annum or more
